payload.summary: Public missile-threat reporting frames Iran as a missile and UAS power, increasing demand for space-based warning, tracking, PNT, and SATCOM support.

observables.space_dependency: brigade needs overhead warning, GPS timing, SATCOM reachback, and ISR downlink continuity
observables.demo_action: preload commander dashboard with space-support risk context before movement

provenance.notes: Public capability context; brigade scenario is fictional

payload.summary: Open-source counterspace reporting includes Iran among states developing counterspace capabilities across electronic warfare, cyber, and related categories.

observables.space_dependency: friendly ISR and SATCOM support to brigade
observables.demo_action: watch for space-service degradation paired with ground EW or cyber anomalies

payload.summary: Brigade spectrum team sees interference against UAS telemetry links that carry space-derived ISR products to maneuver elements.

observables.space_dependency: drone mesh is the local distribution path for satellite imagery and beyond-line-of-sight updates

provenance.notes: Synthetic EW inject tied to space-product distribution

payload.summary: Multiple drones report coherent GPS position shift, degrading trust in space-enabled target-quality coordinates.

observables.space_dependency: GPS provides timing and geolocation confidence for ISR-to-fires handoff
observables.demo_action: isolate GNSS and require human confirmation before using coordinates

payload.summary: UAS mesh shifts relay and ISR lead to DRONE-24 to preserve local distribution of satellite-derived products under PNT degradation.

observables.demo_action: maintain ISR feed but tag target-quality coordinates low confidence

provenance.notes: Synthetic UAS mesh autonomy inject tied to satellite product distribution

payload.summary: Primary SATCOM degrades while UAS mesh is operating in degraded navigation mode.

observables.demo_action: route commander updates over low-bandwidth resilient path

payload.summary: Cyber probes target the data broker that forwards drone-derived observations to fires and intelligence systems.

observables.demo_action: hold target-quality automation and require human confirmation for any fire mission cue

provenance.notes: Synthetic cyber inject; defensive control action only

location.label: Friendly LEO support relative motion frame

payload.summary: Synthetic RPO overlay enters close-approach watch box near a friendly LEO support asset during ground C5ISR disruption.

observables.demo_action: request space support options and protect alternate comms path

provenance.notes: Synthetic RPO inject for space-risk demo

payload.summary: coke-zero assesses the event set as a space-support crisis: PNT trust, SATCOM reachback, satellite-product distribution, cyber access, and RPO risk all degrade inside one decision window.

provenance.notes: Synthetic defensive assessment; confidence-scored language required
